title: XMSS: The NIST-Recommended Stateful Hash-Based Signature
description: Master XMSS (eXtended Merkle Signature Scheme), the NIST SP 800-208 recommended stateful signature scheme. Understand its construction, multi-tree variants, and proper deployment.
learningObjectives: Explain XMSS construction and improvements over basic MSS
Understand XMSS^MT (multi-tree) for larger signature capacities
Analyze XMSS parameter sets and security levels
Apply best practices for stateful signature deployment
